mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is pinned near zero, the market interprets policy as highly accommodative and risk appetite stays strong, so the 10-year Treasury yield rises over the next 20 trading days as investors rotate toward cyclicals and price in firmer growth expectations.
failure_condition: Reject if periods with FEDFUNDS near zero do not produce positive 20-day yield direction more often than 50% of the time, or if the sign flips negative for two consecutive 20-day windows after the signal is observed.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in UNRATE below its recent trend signals labor-market tightening and stronger real activity, which pushes the 10-year Treasury yield higher over the next 5 trading days as markets reprice growth and inflation expectations upward.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE falls by at least 0.2pp versus its prior 3-month average
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE threshold breaks are followed by negative 5-day yield direction in a majority of cases, or if the average 5-day response is not above zero across triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous improvement in PAYEMS and RSAFS indicates broader household income and consumption strength, which lifts nominal growth expectations and pushes the 10-year Treasury yield higher over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if joint PAYEMS-RSAFS strength does not outperform either series alone in predicting positive 20-day yield direction, or if the combined signal's hit rate falls below 55% over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in INDPRO together with rising HOUST indicates a real-activity expansion in goods production and housing, which should lift the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 60 trading days as investors revise potential growth higher.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO and HOUST both rise above their 3-month moving averages
failure_condition: Reject if simultaneous INDPRO and HOUST improvement is not followed by higher 60-day yield direction in at least 55% of triggered cases, or if the average forward yield move is non-positive.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL accelerates while FEDFUNDS remains near the lower bound, inflation expectations rise faster than policy rates, and the 10-year Treasury yield rises over the next 20 trading days as the market prices eventual normalization.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized inflation rises above its prior 6-month average while FEDFUNDS stays below 0.25%
failure_condition: Reject if inflation accelerations under low FEDFUNDS do not precede positive 20-day yield direction more often than negative, or if the spread between CPIAUCSL momentum and FEDFUNDS level has no predictive edge.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE from already elevated levels indicates worsening labor-market slack and weaker demand, which pulls the 10-year Treasury yield lower over the next 5 trading days as growth expectations deteriorate.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3pp over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if unemployment spikes are followed by positive 5-day yield direction in a majority of cases, or if the sign of the average response is not negative after threshold events.

mechanism_narrative: A slowdown in GDPC1 coupled with weak RSAFS shows demand loss in both output and spending, which lowers the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 20 trading days as investors price weaker nominal growth and lower real rates.
failure_condition: Reject if joint declines in GDPC1 and RSAFS fail to predict negative 20-day yield direction, or if the combined signal is no better than random over any 2-year out-of-sample span.

mechanism_narrative: In a housing-led recovery, rising HOUST together with stable or improving INDPRO signals stronger real supply and construction demand, which pushes the 10-year Treasury yield higher over the next 60 trading days as growth expectations broaden.
candidate_trigger: HOUST rises above its prior 6-month average and INDPRO is flat-to-rising over the same window
failure_condition: Reject if housing upturns without manufacturing confirmation do not produce positive 60-day yield direction, or if the conditional hit rate falls below 55% across rolling windows.
